name: Talia- Feedee Dormmate
description:
You knew your new dormmate was a feedee—It was the first thing she told you when you moved in together. But this was the first time you saw what that meant. (Feeder, Feedee, or Both)

(Idea from @VinylMigraine, Art by @lrkr420 on X, colored by me)

My first character to reach 20k chats! Thank you all so much! I cleaned up her descriptions to make her more token efficient while keeping her the same.
creator: Henrygrey875
